subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto them that dwell in the realm of possibility, and verily it summoneth all unto a station wherein naught can be seen save the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان و انه یدع الکل الی مقام لایری فیه الا انوار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
